title: byrsopteris hasseltii
intro: Byrsopteris hasseltii, also known as the Hasselt's fir-moss, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Davalliaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Byrsopteris hasseltii is often prepared into herbal infusions or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
